title: Grok down: Users report app, website and login issues
summary: Grok, Elon Musk's AI chatbot, faced significant disruptions on Friday. Users reported being unable to access the service, receive replies, or log in. Most issues were reported by mobile app users. This outage adds to recent technical problems faced by Grok.

title: OpenAI brings Codex coding tool to ChatGPT mobile app
summary: OpenAI is integrating its Codex coding tool into the ChatGPT mobile app, broadening access to AI code-generation capabilities. This move intensifies competition with rivals like Anthropic, as Codex can write features, answer code questions, fix bugs, and propose pull requests.
